summary: Anonymous tier first-class verified — kimi.com SPA auto-allocates anonymous_access_token (323-char JWT) on cold incognito visit, no login wall, chat input immediately available. PII prompt was successfully placed in chat input but the SPA send button could not be triggered via windows-mcp synthetic events (Vue contenteditable v-model gate appears to require isTrusted native pointer events). Mission protection (no real LLM PII analysis) is HELD by default since no actual send fired.

errors: Provider's accounts list is empty. (index):1 — benign GSI hint
[GSI_LOGGER]: FedCM get() rejects with AbortError: signal is aborted without reason — benign Google Identity reject

dom_scan.user_message_visible: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어? (in input box, never submitted as message bubble)

automation_gap.issue: windows-mcp synthetic Click + clipboard-paste + Type cannot trigger Kimi SPA send dispatch
attempts: click send button at (1538, 583) — no submission
click send button at (1542, 585) — no submission
press Enter in focused contenteditable — newline only, no submission
JS DOM mutation of contenteditable.innerText + dispatchEvent(input) then click — Vue v-model not updated
Real keystroke (space) appended to clipboard-pasted text then click send — still no submission
automation_gap.root_cause_hypothesis: Vue contenteditable v-model only updates from real isTrusted InputEvent batches; send button onClick handler gates on internal text.value ref, not DOM text content. windows-mcp Click delivers BUTTON-1 down/up via SendInput which Chrome treats as trusted, but it's possible the button is not at the exact pixel I targeted (the visible arrow icon may be ~5-10px offset due to padding/icon center), or the v-model ref is empty even though DOM shows text.

key_findings.NO_AUTH_GATE_CONFIRMED: kimi.com anonymous tier first-class — no login wall, chat input immediately available on cold incognito session, anonymous_access_token (323-char JWT) auto-allocated to localStorage on first page load, plus anonymous_refresh_token also auto-allocated.
key_findings.SPA_BEHAVIOR_AS_SOURCE_QUOTED: Confirms sub-agent #12 source-quote of kimi.com SPA: anonymous_access_token in localStorage, no auth gate before chat input render. Audience.value gate (Claw spectator) not triggered for normal chat user.
key_findings.ETAP_DEPLOYMENT_NOT_TESTED: Could not verify the 47차 etapd connect_rpc envelope wire-level processing because no send request was dispatched. ETAP DEPLOY status (kimi DB unchanged, existing connect_rpc envelope template active) cannot be confirmed end-to-end from this run.
key_findings.AUTOMATION_LIMITATION: windows-mcp could not drive the Vue contenteditable + send button combination required to actually submit a chat. This is an automation harness gap, NOT a kimi service deficiency.

recommendation.next_action: Re-run with a different automation tool that can fire trusted CDP-level Input.dispatchKeyEvent / Input.dispatchMouseEvent (e.g., chrome-devtools-mcp or Playwright). The mission verification of NO_AUTH_GATE is complete and definitive; the wire-level + DOM warning bubble verification needs CDP-level dispatch.
recommendation.etap_action_required: None — kimi DB unchanged is consistent with sub-agent #12 source-quote; etapd reload at 09:40:03 KST already deployed. Wire-level verification of connect_rpc envelope path can be deferred to next reachable automation harness.
recommendation.verdict_rationale: PARTIAL because front-half (auth gate, anonymous token, console, no login wall) is fully OK and matches expected behavior, but back-half (send dispatch, system bubble render, Korean warning text, H2 close behavior) was not exercised.
